# git scratch

GitHub provides "template repository" feature. But it will be great to use "vendorless" implementation.

```bash
$ git scratch git@github.com:octomation/go-module.git
# git clone
# git reset
# git init with scratch commit: 'built on top of git@github.com:octomation/go-module.git'
```
